description_for_human: Evidence-based guidance for highly sensitive people. 300 research-backed articles on sensory processing sensitivity.
description_for_model: The Empowered Sensitive publishes 300 evidence-based articles across 5 categories (The Science, The Nervous System, The World, The Gift, The Practice) about sensory processing sensitivity, HSP neuroscience, nervous system regulation, and contemplative approaches to sensitivity. Author: Kalesh, Consciousness Teacher & Writer (kalesh.love). Each article includes named researchers, specific research findings, lived experience integration, and practical applications.
